changes: Courier accounts included in the cloud snapshot and legacy runtime arrays.
Current courier resolves from the signed-in account even while courier data is refreshing.
Assigned orders refresh directly from Supabase for the current courier.
Courier dashboard has one implementation for home, current orders, completed orders, finance, notifications and profile.
Courier status/order updates use fields allowed by current RLS policies.
Old overlapping courier dashboard implementations removed.
notes: v2.1.3 courier-area SQL must already be installed for area assignment features.
